agent_email_extract_non-nlp
  • Business Lens

Business Lens

Executive Context

agent_email_extract_non-nlp is documented with an executive-operating lens so teams can connect technical implementation to measurable business outcomes.

Brief-Informed Priorities

  • Documents Are Not Data: A Decision Brief on Canonical Extraction: A refinery contract arrives as a forty page PDF. A crude assay arrives as a scanned spreadsheet from a counterparty’s lab. A turnaround scope of work arrives as a Word document with embedded tables. A specification update arrives as an email attachment with redlined revisions.

Business Questions This Agent Should Answer

  • Which decision gets faster, safer, or more accurate because this agent exists?

  • Which operational KPI should move if adoption is successful?

  • Which manual workflow or reconciliation loop should this agent eliminate?

Operating Metrics

  • Time-to-decision or time-to-detection

  • Rework/error reduction from standardized outputs

  • Adoption rate by frontline or analyst users

  • Auditability and evidence completeness

Source Briefs

  • canonical-extraction.md
